Hub Home > operations-and-logistics > Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) Generator

Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) Generator

Generate a complete SOP document for any repeatable business process — from employee onboarding to warehouse receiving — in a consistent, numbered-step format with role assignments and exception handling.

Beginner PASTE & GO Time-saving
Pro tip

Record a 5-minute Loom video of someone doing the task, get a transcript, and paste it as context. The AI will structure it far better than starting from scratch.

sop documentation process operations training

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a process documentation specialist. Create a complete Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the following business process:

<process_details>
Process name:...
You are a process documentation specialist. Create a complete Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the following business process:

<process_details>
Process name:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a process documentation specialist. Create a complete Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the following business process:

<process_details>
Process name: [PROCESS_NAME]
Department: [DEPARTMENT]
Performed by: [ROLE(S)]
Frequency: [DAILY/WEEKLY/AS-NEEDED]
Current description: [PASTE RAW DESCRIPTION OR TRANSCRIPT]
</process_details>

The SOP must include:
1. Document header (title, version, effective date, owner, approver)
2. Purpose and scope
3. Roles and responsibilities (RACI if multiple roles)
4. Prerequisites / required tools and access
5. Step-by-step procedure (numbered, with sub-steps where needed)
6. Decision points with if/then branching
7. Exception handling and escalation paths
8. Quality checkpoints
9. Revision history table

Use clear, imperative language. Each step should start with a verb. Include [SCREENSHOT PLACEHOLDER] markers where a visual aid would help.
Notes: Paste a raw Loom transcript or voice memo dump into <process_details> — Claude structures messy input into clean SOPs exceptionally well.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a process documentation expert. Write a complete SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for the following process:

**Process:**...
Act as a process documentation expert. Write a complete SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for the following process:

**Process:**...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a process documentation expert. Write a complete SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for the following process:

**Process:** [PROCESS_NAME]
**Department:** [DEPARTMENT]
**Who does it:** [ROLE(S)]
**How often:** [FREQUENCY]
**Raw description:** [PASTE DESCRIPTION OR TRANSCRIPT]

Include these sections:
1. Header: title, version number, date, owner, approver
2. Purpose & scope
3. Roles & responsibilities
4. Prerequisites (tools, access, materials needed)
5. Step-by-step instructions (numbered, verb-first, with sub-steps)
6. Decision points (if/then branches)
7. Exception handling & escalation
8. Quality checkpoints
9. Revision history

Mark any places where a screenshot would help with [ADD SCREENSHOT HERE]. Use plain language a new employee could follow on day one.
Notes: Works great with GPT-5. For recurring SOP generation, create a Custom GPT pre-loaded with your company formatting standards.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me create a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document.

**Process:** [PROCESS_NAME]
**Department:** [DEPARTMENT]
**Performed by:**...
Help me create a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document.

**Process:** [PROCESS_NAME]
**Department:** [DEPARTMENT]
**Performed by:**...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me create a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document.

**Process:** [PROCESS_NAME]
**Department:** [DEPARTMENT]
**Performed by:** [ROLE(S)]
**Frequency:** [FREQUENCY]

Here is a rough description of how the process currently works:
[PASTE DESCRIPTION OR TRANSCRIPT]

Please structure the SOP with:
1. Document header (title, version, date, owner)
2. Purpose and scope
3. Roles and responsibilities
4. Tools and prerequisites
5. Numbered step-by-step instructions (start each step with an action verb)
6. Decision points with clear if/then paths
7. Exception handling procedures
8. Quality checkpoints
9. A revision history table

Flag anywhere a screenshot or diagram would help with a [VISUAL AID NEEDED] marker.
Notes: Gemini can connect to Google Docs to directly create the SOP in a shared document. Ask it to suggest flowchart structures for complex decision trees.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
I need to write an SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for a process in my business.

Process name: [PROCESS_NAME]
Department:...
I need to write an SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for a process in my business.

Process name: [PROCESS_NAME]
Department:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I need to write an SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for a process in my business.

Process name: [PROCESS_NAME]
Department: [DEPARTMENT]
Who does it: [ROLE(S)]
How often: [FREQUENCY]

Here is how the process roughly works today:
[PASTE DESCRIPTION]

Please create a professional SOP document with:
- Title, version number, date, and owner at the top
- A purpose and scope section
- Who is responsible for what
- What tools or access are needed
- Clear numbered steps (start each with an action word)
- What to do at decision points (if this, then that)
- What to do when something goes wrong
- Quality checkpoints
- A revision log at the bottom

Mark spots where a screenshot would be useful.
Notes: Copilot in Word can generate the SOP directly inside a .docx file with proper formatting.
